notes: W4-1 (ADR-010): retro-real 15 entries (3 bootstrap + 12 real anonymized 2026-05~07). The eval dataset used by the runners lives vendored in-repo at packages/forgen-eval/datasets/opus48-hard/, so runs ARE reproducible from this repo. The EXTERNAL source pin, however, is unresolved: the W4-1 commit was authored in a local forgen-eval-data checkout and never pushed to the public repo (both f5ab2e3 and 488077a return 422 there). Set back to PLACEHOLDER_BOOTSTRAP honestly until R2 pushes the dataset public and re-pins to a resolvable commit. Do NOT claim 'resolved' before that push.
